caption: A man with glasses, a tall silver-grey wig, a white dress shirt with suspenders, and a red bow tie sits in a recording studio. He wears over-the-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a "LEE" branded shirt. Two logos appear on screen: "T STALIO PODCAST" on the left and "GOSS TALK JOY" on the right. Across the sequence, the man maintains his position while speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. His facial expressions shift slightly, and he moves his head subtly from side to side. The camera remains static, and the background elements and on-screen text remain constant throughout the clip.
